details: Leading Flutter development of **Manage The Day (MTD)**, a production-grade, cross-platform AI productivity platform (iOS, Android, and Web) built from a single codebase.
Engineered a **unified multi-provider calendar** (Google, Apple/CalDAV, Microsoft 365, and on-device iOS EventKit) with drag & drop, recurrence, and colour-coded cross-calendar sync.
Integrated **iOS Live Activities & ActivityKit** (Dynamic Island + lock-screen timers) and optimised Android background services for real-time task tracking.
Built an in-app **AI assistant** (FastAPI + Google Agent Development Kit / Genkit + Firebase Functions) for natural-language task, goal, and project management.
Owns app architecture (BLoC, Provider, Riverpod) and real-time data flow across Firebase Auth, Firestore, Storage, and FastAPI backends.
Led end-to-end development of Flutter + GraphQL applications for SaaS clients, focused on stability, scalability, and rich user experiences.
Built **Crooze**, a community fitness-challenge app — community/club/individual challenges, leaderboards, certificate generation — and fixed crash loops and state inconsistencies.
Worked on **AgreEasy**, a multilingual B2B agriculture platform connecting farmers with hotels and restaurants — localization, network reliability, and notification flow.
Debugged Binder transaction failures by throttling isolate updates and optimising background data processing.
Used **GraphQL** for efficient data fetching and improved caching, reducing API latency and payloads.
Built **SimbaCourse**, an education-management platform (Flutter + Express.js + MongoDB) — handled both frontend and backend from scratch.
Delivered course creation, enrolment, progress tracking, and communication across admin, teacher, and student roles.
Contributed to full-stack projects across Java, Flutter, and React for enterprise clients.
Gained professional workflow experience — code reviews, CI/CD pipelines, and agile development.
Completed EPAM's six-month campus training in Advanced Java and Spring Boot.
Built impactful practical projects including a quiz application and an e-commerce web application.
Applied core backend and OOP concepts to real-world, professional-grade solutions.
